title: Walls, Shields, and Illusions: Defenses and Their Limits
summary: Essay #3 in the Humble Model SeriesI. Introduction: The Arms Race BeginsIn Essay #2, we saw the attack. A well-trained model, 99.19% accurate on clean MNIST, was silent about its own limits.
